title: Framed Glass
description: Add medieval themed frames to colored glass blocks and panes. Compatible with Continuity and Optifine
body:
# Hello There
This small resource pack adds custom glass textures for every colored glass block and pane. Glass panes render their sides to make the frame more prominet. Clear glass blocks and panes connect textures because this pack contains Continuity's built-in resource pack for connected textures and also works fine with OptiFine.

Get a quick overview in this video from 6:43 to 7:43:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QVHNhv8FHGo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Have a look at the gallery for a better overview.

### I created different versions of the pack:

[Framed Glass Blocks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/framed-glass-blocks): Only all colored glass blocks use the frame texture (except for regular and tinted glass)  
[Framed Glass Panes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/framed-glass-panes): Only colored glass panes are changed.

### Credit
If you have any feedback, feel free to join my Discord and let me know.
Make sure to check out my other packs on my Modrinth profile as well :D
